projectName: MPADQ — Music Performance Anxiety Diagnostic Questionnaire
projectDescription: A web-based assessment platform that delivers the companion diagnostic questionnaire for Dr. Heather Nicole Winter's book 'Take Charge of Your Performance Anxiety,' scoring musicians across symptom and contributing-factor categories and providing personalised results.
keyFeatures: License-key–gated access: each book purchase generates a unique 10-character key that activates exactly one quiz attempt
15-question demographic section capturing musician background, instrument, career status, and health factors
157-question Likert-scale assessment scored on a 1–5 (Strongly Disagree to Strongly Agree) scale with N/A option
Two broad scoring categories: Symptomatology (Physical, Cognitive, Behavioral) and Contributing Factors (21 sub-categories)
Automatic weighted scoring with sub-category and broad-category averages stored per user in MySQL
Admin dashboard for key generation, question editing, score-text editing, and CSV data export
PayPal IPN integration for automated key delivery on purchase
Results review: users can re-enter their key post-completion to view their personalised scores
publicApiSurface: GET / — Landing page; key entry form
POST /keySubmit.php — Validates key, starts session, redirects to quiz or results
GET /start/ — Quiz introduction and initialisation page
GET /demographics/ — Renders 15-question demographic form from demographicQuestions.json
POST /demographics/questionSubmit.php — Persists demographic answers to DemographicAnswer table
GET /likert/ — Renders 157-question Likert form (10 questions per page) from likertQuestions.json
POST /likert/questionSubmit.php — Persists Likert answers to LikertAnswer table
GET /finish/ — Computes sub-category and broad-category scores; renders personalised results page
POST /purchaseSuccessful/authenticate_ipn.php — PayPal IPN handler; generates and emails a license key on verified payment
GET /admin/ — Admin login page
POST /admin/dashboard/authenticate.php — Authenticates admin credentials
GET /admin/dashboard/ — Admin dashboard home
GET/POST /admin/dashboard/keygen/ — Bulk license key generation
GET /admin/dashboard/keygen/keys/ — Lists and downloads generated keys
GET /admin/dashboard/data-view/view-1/ — CSV export: per-user raw answers (demographic + Likert)
GET /admin/dashboard/data-view/view-2/ — CSV export: per-user scored results
GET/POST /admin/dashboard/question-edit/ — Edit demographic and Likert questions
GET/POST /admin/dashboard/understanding-your-scores-edit/ — Edit broad/sub-category result explanatory text
GET/POST /admin/dashboard/change-password/ — Change admin password
GET/POST /admin/dashboard/update-email/ — Update admin contact email
GET /admin/dashboard/logout.php — Destroy admin session
